methods.name: bootstrap
methods.desc: Set pool configuration. Does NOT create LP token ASAs yet (call create_assets() after funding).

methods.name: create_assets
methods.desc:
Create LP token ASAs. Call AFTER funding the app address (MBR: ~0.3 ALGO per token).
Creates two ASAs: senior LP token + junior LP token.
asset_name_prefix: e.g. "iUSDC" → creates "iUSDC-S-LP" and "iUSDC-J-LP"

methods.name: deposit

args.name: payment
args.desc: - the preceding asset transfer transaction (index in group)

methods.desc: Lend into the pool. Caller must send an asset transfer in the same atomic group.

methods.name: deposit_algo
methods.desc:
Deposit native ALGO (for the ALGO pool only).
The ALGO payment is detected via the preceding pay transaction in the group.

methods.name: withdraw

args.name: tranche
args.desc: - must match the depositor's original tranche

args.name: lp_amount
args.desc: - LP tokens to burn (uint64; caller must have already sent LP tokens back)

methods.desc: Burn LP tokens and redeem principal + accrued yield.

methods.name: borrow
methods.desc:
Called by LoanFactory (internal). Sends assets to the borrower.
Checks circuit breaker and available liquidity.

methods.name: repay

args.name: payment
args.desc: - the asset transfer transaction in the atomic group

methods.desc: Called by LoanFactory. The asset transfer (repayment) must precede this call.
